llm_summary.summary: Pedro Cao Eiriz is the subject of this case, contactable at +34617758559 and pedrocaoeiriz@gmail.com. His stated address is Passeig Maragall 13, Entresuelo 1, 08026 Barcelona, ES, though this has not been independently confirmed via open sources. A secondary work email, pedro.cao@xuxescompany.com, is associated with GitHub and Twitter accounts. His phone number is registered on iCloud and Uber; the Uber account's masked email matches a Gmail address. His primary email is active on platforms including KuCoin, Adobe, and Microsoft Account. The email address appears in two historical data breaches (2017 Taringa, 2018 8fit), with exposed data including passwords, usernames, and geographic locations; one exposed password is a weak hash. His identifiers also appear in the Phone House España breach. He is a Google Maps Local Guides Level 2 contributor with 1 review and 2 photos, one of which is linked to Itnig Café. No employer, job title, or business registration has been confirmed. Debt amount, origin, age, and prior call history are not on file for this case.

breaches_details.details: 8fit, a popular fitness and health app, experienced a data breach. The breach occurred in early 2021, with the database made public later in June. The leaked data included email addresses and usernames, along with salted MD5 password hashes.

Data breach that occurred at Taringa, a Latin American social network in 2018. The data breach was the result of a hacking incident in which the personal information of over 28 million users was exposed. The data that was compromised included email addresses, hashed passwords, and personal information such as names, birth dates, and location data.
